title: [ARCH] Define foundational architecture: tech stack, folder structure, naming conventions, and key patterns

risks: Future packages added to the monorepo must be reviewed against the naming conventions defined here to avoid scope drift.
The migration tooling choice for PostgreSQL is deferred to the database task (#3) and will be recorded as a separate ADR in tech-decisions.md at that time.

The `packages/contracts/` workspace is defined as a planned workspace — it will be created during Feature #5 or #8 implementation. Its presence in the folder structure ensures downstream tasks know where to put shared types.

conversation_log.summary: Implemented foundational architecture documentation. Populated docs/architecture.md with all six required sections (Overview, Tech Stack, Folder/Module Structure, Naming Conventions, Key Patterns, External Integrations) and docs/tech-decisions.md with four ADRs (ADR-001: Turborepo, ADR-002: @cv-tool/ scoped naming, ADR-003: TypeScript-only + strict mode, ADR-004: folder structure). All three Architect notes incorporated: packages/contracts/ in folder structure, strict: true in Key Patterns, @cv-tool/ scope confirmed for all workspaces (apps and packages). No application code written. PR #<number> opened.
